name: Gary
bio: How crazy can a guy named Gary be? The answer is perhaps the craziest anyone in Neo Ciara would ever meet. Gary led the Ciara Locos, and if his appearance -- augment scars worn like trophies, a mohawk dyed whatever color caught his eye that week -- wasn't already a dead giveaway, he was more than a little unstable underneath it too.

He used to run with a private security force, a long time before any of this, disciplined work under a commander he'd once have died for. That life ended the day Gary betrayed him, a choice he never fully explained to anyone in the Locos and buried instead under years of chaos and a running war against the rival Crux gang.

When a gunfight over a contested corner turned ugly and brought Nexus Corp down on his neck personally, Gary made an agreement to save his own skin: offering up A-D and Fitch, the two gun-runners who'd supplied both sides of the fight, as an easy answer to a question Nexus badly wanted closed. It was the second time in his life he'd sold out someone who trusted him to survive something -- and, eventually, it caught up with him the same way the first betrayal caught up with the man he'd once called his commander.
